cards.back: A method of data transmission where packets of data are transmitted separately and reassembled at the receiving end
A type of packet switching where the switch stores each packet in its buffer before forwarding it to its destination
A type of packet switching where the switch examines the destination MAC address on the packet header and forwards it without storing it in its buffer
A type of packet switching where a dedicated connection is established between the sender and receiver before data is sent
A type of packet switching where no dedicated connection is established between the sender and receiver, and each packet is sent independently
